---
title: "Annual Clinical Metrics Descriptive Analysis"
author: "Nemo Zhou"
date: "2026-07-03"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  descriptive_output_dir: null
  analysis_year_label: null
---

<!--
Project: Frailty_Komoto annual clinical metrics descriptive visualization
Author: Nemo Zhou
Date started: 2026-07-02
Date last updated: 2026-07-03

Purpose:
This R Markdown report visualizes aggregate annual clinical metrics outputs
created by Code/4.1_describe_annual_clinical_metrics.R. It does not connect to
Redshift. It reads aggregate CSV files from the project-root Outputs folder,
including visualization-input CSVs prepared by
Code/4.3_prepare_annual_clinical_metrics_visualization_inputs.R, and renders CFI
and Gagne histograms, box plots, stacked subgroup bar plots, Table 1 summaries,
an HIV-status Table 1, HIV-positive subgroup prevalence, and overall CCW
group/disease prevalence tables.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)

library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
```

```{r helpers}
if (!is.null(params$descriptive_output_dir) && nzchar(params$descriptive_output_dir)) {
  output_dir <- params$descriptive_output_dir
} else {
  output_dir_candidates <- file.path(
    c("Outputs", "../Outputs"),
    "4.1_annual_clinical_metrics_descriptive"
  )
  output_dir <- output_dir_candidates[
    dir.exists(output_dir_candidates)
  ][1]
}

if (is.null(output_dir) || is.na(output_dir) || !dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  stop(
    "Could not find the clinical metrics descriptive output directory. ",
    "Run Code/4.1_describe_annual_clinical_metrics.R first."
  )
}

read_required_csv <- function(file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(
      "Missing required file: ",
      path,
      ". Run Code/4.1_describe_annual_clinical_metrics.R first."
    )
  }

  utils::read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

comma_label <- function(x) {
  format(
    round(x),
    big.mark = ",",
    scientific = FALSE,
    trim = TRUE
  )
}

percent_label <- function(x) {
  paste0(sprintf("%.1f", 100 * as.numeric(x)), "%")
}

count_percent_label <- function(n, proportion) {
  n_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(n))
  proportion_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(proportion))

  ifelse(
    is.na(n_value) | is.na(proportion_value),
    NA_character_,
    paste0(comma_label(n_value), " (", percent_label(proportion_value), ")")
  )
}

format_n_header <- function(label, n) {
  paste0(label, " (N=", comma_label(n), ")")
}

metric_level_palette <- c(
  "Non-frail" = "#2E7D32",
  "Prefrail" = "#F9A825",
  "Frail" = "#C62828",
  "Gagne <0" = "#6A4C93",
  "Gagne 0" = "#2E86AB",
  "Gagne 1-2" = "#52B788",
  "Gagne 3-5" = "#F9C74F",
  "Gagne 6+" = "#D62828",
  "HIV negative" = "#3A86FF",
  "HIV positive" = "#FF006E"
)

table_one_variable_labels <- c(
  age_group = "Age group",
  insurance_type = "Mx insurance group",
  insurance_segment = "Mx insurance segment",
  race_ethnicity = "Race/ethnicity",
  sex = "Sex",
  hiv_status = "HIV status"
)

table_one_variable_order <- c(
  "Age group",
  "Mx insurance group",
  "Mx insurance segment",
  "Overall",
  "Race/ethnicity",
  "Sex",
  "HIV status"
)

format_table_one_display <- function(
  data,
  group_column,
  denominator_column,
  percent_column,
  group_labels
) {
  data$variable <- table_one_variable_labels[data$variable]
  data$group_label <- group_labels[data[[group_column]]]
  data$cell <- percent_label(data[[percent_column]])
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$variable) & !is.na(data$group_label),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  denominators <- unique(data[
    ,
    c("analysis_year", "group_label", denominator_column),
    drop = FALSE
  ])
  names(denominators)[names(denominators) == denominator_column] <- "denominator"

  overall_rows <- denominators
  overall_rows$variable <- "Overall"
  overall_rows$category <- "Overall"
  overall_rows$cell <- "100.0%"

  display_data <- rbind(
    data[, c("analysis_year", "variable", "category", "group_label", "cell")],
    overall_rows[, c("analysis_year", "variable", "category", "group_label", "cell")]
  )
  names(display_data)[names(display_data) == "category"] <- "level"

  output_tables <- list()
  for (analysis_year in unique(display_data$analysis_year)) {
    year_data <- display_data[
      display_data$analysis_year == analysis_year,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    year_denominators <- denominators[
      denominators$analysis_year == analysis_year,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]

    levels <- unique(year_data[, c("variable", "level"), drop = FALSE])
    levels$variable_order <- match(levels$variable, table_one_variable_order)
    levels$level_order <- seq_len(nrow(levels))

    rows <- list()
    for (row_index in seq_len(nrow(levels))) {
      base_row <- levels[row_index, , drop = FALSE]
      output_row <- data.frame(
        variable = base_row$variable,
        level = base_row$level,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      for (group_label in unname(group_labels)) {
        header <- format_n_header(
          group_label,
          year_denominators$denominator[
            year_denominators$group_label == group_label
          ][1]
        )
        matching_cell <- year_data$cell[
          year_data$variable == base_row$variable &
            year_data$level == base_row$level &
            year_data$group_label == group_label
        ]
        output_row[[header]] <- if (length(matching_cell) == 0L) {
          NA_character_
        } else {
          matching_cell[[1]]
        }
      }

      rows[[length(rows) + 1L]] <- output_row
    }

    table <- do.call(rbind, rows)
    table$variable_order <- match(table$variable, table_one_variable_order)
    table$level_order <- seq_len(nrow(table))
    table <- table[
      order(table$variable_order, table$level_order),
      setdiff(names(table), c("variable_order", "level_order")),
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    output_tables[[as.character(analysis_year)]] <- table
  }

  output_tables
}

print_table_one <- function(tables) {
  for (analysis_year in names(tables)) {
    if (length(tables) > 1L) {
      cat("\n\n### ", analysis_year, "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat(knitr::kable(tables[[analysis_year]], row.names = FALSE), sep = "\n")
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}

format_prevalence_table <- function(data, label_columns, count_column) {
  sort_columns <- intersect(c("ccw_group", "ccw_condition_name"), names(data))
  if (length(sort_columns) > 0L) {
    data <- data[
      do.call(order, data[sort_columns]),
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
  }

  denominator <- unique(data$denominator_person_years)
  if (length(denominator) != 1L) {
    denominator <- denominator[[1]]
  }

  output <- data[, label_columns, drop = FALSE]
  output[[format_n_header("Overall prevalence", denominator)]] <-
    count_percent_label(data[[count_column]], data$prevalence)
  output
}

format_hiv_positive_prevalence_table <- function(data) {
  data <- data[data$metric_level == "HIV positive", , drop = FALSE]
  data$n_person_years <- as.numeric(data$n_person_years)
  data$subgroup_denominator <- as.numeric(data$subgroup_denominator)
  data$percent_within_subgroup <- as.numeric(data$percent_within_subgroup)
  data$stratification <- unname(table_one_variable_labels[data$stratification])
  data <- data[!is.na(data$stratification), , drop = FALSE]

  data$stratification <- factor(data$stratification, levels = table_one_variable_order)
  data <- data[
    order(data$analysis_year, data$stratification, data$stratum_value),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  output <- data.frame(
    Subgroup = as.character(data$stratification),
    Level = data$stratum_value,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
  output[["HIV positive prevalence"]] <- count_percent_label(
    data$n_person_years,
    data$percent_within_subgroup
  )
  output
}

plot_histogram <- function(data, metric_label, bin_width) {
  data$bin_start <- as.numeric(data$bin_start)
  data$n_person_years <- as.numeric(data$n_person_years)

  ggplot(data, aes(x = bin_start, y = n_person_years)) +
    geom_col(width = bin_width, fill = "#3F7C85", color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
    facet_wrap(~ analysis_year, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma_label) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Distribution of", metric_label),
      x = metric_label,
      y = "Person-years"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

plot_box_by_subgroup <- function(data, metric_label) {
  numeric_columns <- c("minimum", "p25", "median", "p75", "maximum", "n_person_years")
  data[numeric_columns] <- lapply(data[numeric_columns], as.numeric)
  data <- data[!is.na(data$n_person_years) & data$n_person_years >= 11, , drop = FALSE]
  data$facet_label <- if (length(unique(data$analysis_year)) > 1L) {
    paste(data$stratification, data$analysis_year, sep = " / ")
  } else {
    data$stratification
  }
  data$stratum_value <- stats::reorder(data$stratum_value, data$median)

  ggplot(
    data,
    aes(
      x = stratum_value,
      ymin = minimum,
      lower = p25,
      middle = median,
      upper = p75,
      ymax = maximum
    )
  ) +
    geom_boxplot(stat = "identity", fill = "#A44A3F", width = 0.5) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~ facet_label, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = paste(metric_label, "distribution by subgroup"),
      x = NULL,
      y = metric_label
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10)
}

single_stacked_level_distribution_plot <- function(
  data,
  metric_label,
  level_order,
  stratification_label
) {
  data$percent_within_subgroup <- as.numeric(data$percent_within_subgroup)
  data$n_person_years <- as.numeric(data$n_person_years)
  data$subgroup_denominator <- as.numeric(data$subgroup_denominator)
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$percent_within_subgroup) &
      !is.na(data$subgroup_denominator) &
      data$subgroup_denominator >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  data$metric_level <- factor(data$metric_level, levels = level_order)
  data$stratification <- table_one_variable_labels[data$stratification]
  data <- data[!is.na(data$stratification), , drop = FALSE]
  data <- data[data$stratification == stratification_label, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  data$plot_label <- ""
  data$plot_label[data$percent_within_subgroup >= 0.05] <- sprintf(
    "%.0f",
    100 * data$percent_within_subgroup[data$percent_within_subgroup >= 0.05]
  )
  near_complete <- data$percent_within_subgroup >= 0.95 &
    data$percent_within_subgroup < 1
  data$plot_label[near_complete] <- sprintf(
    "%.1f",
    100 * data$percent_within_subgroup[near_complete]
  )
  data$plot_label[data$percent_within_subgroup == 1] <- "100"
  data$stratum_value <- factor(data$stratum_value, levels = unique(data$stratum_value))

  ggplot(
    data,
    aes(
      x = stratum_value,
      y = n_person_years,
      fill = metric_level
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.5, color = "white", linewidth = 0.15, position = "fill") +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = plot_label),
      position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
      color = "white",
      size = 2.8
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x), "%"),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = metric_level_palette,
      breaks = level_order,
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste(metric_label, "level distribution by", stratification_label),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Proportion",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
}

print_stacked_level_distribution_plots <- function(data, metric_label, level_order) {
  stratification_order <- table_one_variable_order[
    table_one_variable_order != "Overall"
  ]
  available_strata <- table_one_variable_labels[unique(data$stratification)]
  stratification_order <- stratification_order[
    stratification_order %in% available_strata
  ]

  for (stratification_label in stratification_order) {
    print(single_stacked_level_distribution_plot(
      data,
      metric_label,
      level_order,
      stratification_label
    ))
  }
}
```

```{r read-data}
cfi_histogram <- read_required_csv("4.1_cfi_histogram_bins.csv")
cfi_boxplot <- read_required_csv("4.1_cfi_distribution_by_strata.csv")
cfi_table_one <- read_required_csv("4.1_table_one_by_frailty_level_categorical.csv")
cfi_level_distribution <- read_required_csv("4.3_cfi_level_distribution_by_subgroup.csv")

gagne_histogram <- read_required_csv("4.1_gagne_histogram_bins.csv")
gagne_boxplot <- read_required_csv("4.1_gagne_distribution_by_strata.csv")
gagne_table_one <- read_required_csv("4.1_table_one_by_gagne_level_categorical.csv")
gagne_level_distribution <- read_required_csv("4.3_gagne_level_distribution_by_subgroup.csv")

hiv_table_one <- read_required_csv("4.1_table_one_by_hiv_status_categorical.csv")
hiv_status_distribution <- read_required_csv("4.3_hiv_status_distribution_by_subgroup.csv")

ccw_group_prevalence <- read_required_csv("4.1_ccw_group_prevalence.csv")
ccw_condition_prevalence <- read_required_csv("4.1_ccw_condition_prevalence.csv")
```

# CFI

## Histogram

```{r cfi-histogram}
plot_histogram(cfi_histogram, "CFI score", bin_width = 0.01)
```

## Box Plots

```{r cfi-boxplots}
plot_box_by_subgroup(cfi_boxplot, "CFI score")
```

## Level Distribution By Subgroup

```{r cfi-level-distribution, fig.show='hold', out.width='49%', fig.width=5.8, fig.height=4.2}
print_stacked_level_distribution_plots(
  cfi_level_distribution,
  "CFI",
  level_order = c("Non-frail", "Prefrail", "Frail")
)
```

## Table 1

```{r cfi-table-one, results='asis'}
print_table_one(format_table_one_display(
  cfi_table_one,
  group_column = "frailty_level",
  denominator_column = "frailty_denominator",
  percent_column = "percent_within_frailty_level",
  group_labels = c(
    "Robust (<0.15)" = "Non-frail",
    "Prefrail (0.15-<0.25)" = "Prefrail",
    "Frail (>=0.25)" = "Frail"
  )
))
```

# Gagne

## Histogram

```{r gagne-histogram}
plot_histogram(gagne_histogram, "Gagne score", bin_width = 1)
```

## Box Plots

```{r gagne-boxplots}
plot_box_by_subgroup(gagne_boxplot, "Gagne score")
```

## Level Distribution By Subgroup

```{r gagne-level-distribution, fig.show='hold', out.width='49%', fig.width=5.8, fig.height=4.2}
print_stacked_level_distribution_plots(
  gagne_level_distribution,
  "Gagne",
  level_order = c("Gagne <0", "Gagne 0", "Gagne 1-2", "Gagne 3-5", "Gagne 6+")
)
```

## Table 1

```{r gagne-table-one, results='asis'}
print_table_one(format_table_one_display(
  gagne_table_one,
  group_column = "gagne_level",
  denominator_column = "gagne_denominator",
  percent_column = "percent_within_gagne_level",
  group_labels = c(
    "Gagne <0" = "Gagne <0",
    "Gagne 0" = "Gagne 0",
    "Gagne 1-2" = "Gagne 1-2",
    "Gagne 3-5" = "Gagne 3-5",
    "Gagne 6+" = "Gagne 6+"
  )
))
```

# HIV Status

## HIV Positive Prevalence

```{r hiv-status-distribution, results='asis'}
cat(knitr::kable(
  format_hiv_positive_prevalence_table(hiv_status_distribution),
  row.names = FALSE
), sep = "\n")
```

## Table 1

```{r hiv-table-one, results='asis'}
print_table_one(format_table_one_display(
  hiv_table_one,
  group_column = "hiv_status_group",
  denominator_column = "hiv_status_denominator",
  percent_column = "percent_within_hiv_status",
  group_labels = c(
    "HIV negative" = "HIV negative",
    "HIV positive" = "HIV positive"
  )
))
```

# CCW Prevalence

## Group Prevalence

```{r ccw-group-prevalence, results='asis'}
ccw_group_display <- format_prevalence_table(
  ccw_group_prevalence,
  label_columns = "ccw_group",
  count_column = "n_with_group"
)
cat(knitr::kable(ccw_group_display, row.names = FALSE), sep = "\n")
```

## Disease Prevalence

```{r ccw-disease-prevalence, results='asis'}
ccw_condition_display <- format_prevalence_table(
  ccw_condition_prevalence,
  label_columns = c("ccw_group", "ccw_condition_name"),
  count_column = "n_with_condition"
)
cat(knitr::kable(ccw_condition_display, row.names = FALSE), sep = "\n")
```
